FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Yield Surge and Iran De-escalation Fuel Rally
tldr_points: Iran's uranium dilution reduces JPY safe-haven demand
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY upside likely as Iran dilutes uranium, US 3-year yield hits 3.965%, and price trades above 20-period MA. Buy dips!
FX.comment: Buy the dip towards 20-MA on Iran de-escalation and high US yields.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Corporate Earnings Surge and Chip Momentum Support Near-Term Rally
tldr_points: Chip sector strength offsets oil‑price concerns

STOCKS.comment: Profit surge and chip rally underpin a bullish near‑term outlook.
